title: What Am I Doing?
content:
With all the news floating around right now, some of the readers might be thinking that I have plenty of materials to write in weeks. Unfortunately, the news is as boring as my writings. So why bother?

Here here, I'm going tell you about what I'm watching/reading. Sounds better already, right? ;)

First, I've just got this book from Amazon called "Why Do Men Have Nipples?":http://www.amazon.com/exec/obidos/tg/detail/-/1400082315/qid=1126895752/sr=8-1/ref=pd_bbs_1/102-0857155-3864137?v=glance&s=books&n=507846. This book talks about %(me)or supposes to% questions of curiosity; something people %(me)or at least me% wonder from time to time. Questions such as "Why do you cry when you cut onions?", "Why do you have an appendix if you can live without it?" and of course "Why do men have nipples?". This book cuts the line and went up to the top of my "haven't read, must finish" list. ... You don't want to know how many books I "haven't read" though.

!-/gallery/20050917/why_men.jpg!

Next, I've also got some new DVDs from Amazon. One of them is "MacGyver":http://www.amazon.com/exec/obidos/tg/detail/-/B0009W5J3M/qid=1126896552/sr=1-1/ref=sr_1_1/102-0857155-3864137?v=glance&s=dvd. I've got all the 3 seasons now but this one is low priority. I just want them for collection. %(me)I used to like Knight Rider but not anymore. Don't know why.%

!-/gallery/20050917/macgyvers.jpg!

The other one is a new series on UBC called "House":http://www.fox.com/house/. It has nothing to do with home improvement. This is a series about a doctor and his team working on mysterious illness using a method called "differential diagnostic". ... I'm not a doctor so I don't know what that is. But I know that I like this series.

!-/gallery/20050917/house.jpg!

Finally, "NUMB3RS":http://www.cbs.com/primetime/numb3rs/, the show uses Mathematics to solve crimes! ... Man, I thought I've seen everything on CSI!

!-/gallery/20050917/numb3rs.jpg!

Anyway,  please don't be disappointed that I haven't talked news lately. As some prime minister %(me)I can't seem to remember his name. Maybe because he is so insignificant. hmmm % says "no news is a good news", right?

Have a good day.

*[ addition ]*

After almost 3 years of returning to Macintosh, I finally got this.

!-/gallery/20050917/halt.jpg!

I'm so excited already. hehehe ;p
